text.title: AI EVM Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the weekly EVM record shape and the RAG band rule. Stakeholders consume this artifact directly after PM signoff.

section.title: Required weekly-report fields

list.item: report_date (ISO date, end-of-week)
baseline_ref (hash of baseline.json at report time)
rebaselined_on (ISO date or null)
pv (number, Planned Value as cumulative through report_date)
ev_sensors (object: at least two named sensors, each with value and read_at_utc)
ev_fused (object: point, ci_low_80, ci_high_80, method: bootstrap | jackknife)
ac (number, sourced from finance sensor; sensor_id and read_at_utc included)
spi (object: point, ci_low_80, ci_high_80)
cpi (object: point, ci_low_80, ci_high_80)
rag_band (enum: green, yellow, red)
flags (array of strings: sensor_stale, sensor_drift, ac_lag, baseline_drift, etc.)
pm_signoff (object: signed_by, signed_at_utc) — required before publish

section.reference: Authoritative JSON Schema for the weekly EVM report.

list.item: green: 0.95 <= SPI_point <= 1.05 AND 0.95 <= CPI_point <= 1.05 AND zero flags.
yellow: 0.85 <= SPI <= 1.15 AND 0.85 <= CPI <= 1.15 AND no `sensor_stale` flag.
red: any of: SPI or CPI outside the yellow band; any sensor_stale flag; any baseline_drift flag; any sensor pair disagreement > 15% relative.

antipattern.reason: r4 violation. Stakeholder publish without PM signoff is forbidden.

antipattern.description: ev_fused.point present without ci_low_80 and ci_high_80.
antipattern.reason: r3 violation. Point estimate alone is misleading.
r2 violation. Single-sensor EV is gameable.

antipattern.description: baseline_ref changed across consecutive reports without a `rebaselined_on` field set.

list.item: Every sensor has read_at_utc within 36h of report_date.
ev_sensors has >= 2 entries.
spi, cpi, ev_fused each carry a CI.
RAG band is consistent with the rule table.
baseline_ref matches the current baseline.json hash OR rebaselined_on is populated.
pm_signoff populated only when a human actually signed.
